title: penstemon newberryi
intro: Penstemon newberryi, also known as Newberry's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family that is native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Penstemon newberryi include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Penstemon newberryi can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
